case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS HOLMES, JAMES JR IND DBA 595 MONTEREY BL APTS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $526.10 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMES, JAMES JR IND DBA 595 MONTEREY BL APTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLMES, JAMES JR IND DBA 595 MONTEREY BL APTS $526.10 PRINCIPAL, $16.29 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $542.39 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
